requests.title: Add clearer guidance for first assignment planning
requests.rationale: Students may need more explicit steps for planning, outlining, and checking assignment requirements without the assistant writing the assignment.
requests.recommendedChange: Add a short checklist for interpreting the assignment brief, identifying required evidence, drafting an outline, and asking the lecturer for clarification.

requests.title: Clarify Moodle navigation support limits
requests.rationale: Students may ask for LMS steps that depend on the live course shell layout.
requests.recommendedChange: Add language explaining that Moodle layout may vary and students should contact the LMS administrator for access or missing-course issues.
requests.notes: Avoid documenting non-final Moodle screen paths until the pilot course shell is confirmed.

requests.title: Add escalation wording for unresolved course policy questions
requests.rationale: The assistant should consistently refer policy, due-date, grading, and lecturer-specific questions to the lecturer or LMS.
requests.recommendedChange: Add a short policy-escalation note that distinguishes study support from official course decisions.
requests.notes: Do not imply that the assistant can grade work or approve exceptions.

governanceNotes: Use this register to propose knowledge base changes from pilot feedback and review meetings.
Only approved changes should be copied into data/fyec100-knowledge-base.md.
Do not store student names, IDs, grades, or private student information in change requests.
